who: medical billing coordinators in small clinics processing 5–15 invoices/month
offer: For medical billing coordinators in small clinics processing 5–15 invoices/month, frequent billing errors cause cash flow gaps. We generate daily patient billing error reports instead of manual tracking of billing errors.
problem: Frequent billing errors lead to delayed payments and cash flow issues.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for medical billing coordinators
Indie Hackers posts about similar workflows
DM outreach to medical billing coordinators with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools and resources
try_it: Let users try daily error report generation and manual tracking on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video of manual-first workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly updates in relevant communities
